spend_model_flags.ai_maturity_notes: No CIO, CDO, or CAIO identified publicly. Formed 2022 from HollyFrontier + Sinclair merger — IT integration likely still in progress. SAP probable given refining peers. No public AI programs or cloud platform confirmed. Score 5.

enrichment_notes: FY2024 revenue $28.57B — highly commodity-exposed refining. ~4,800 employees. Revenue >$10B triggers OEM deduction. Dallas HQ within STOLA.
